programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: To avoid prosecution and to increase the value of his work an artist fakes his own death following the accidental death of one of his models Before long he goes stir crazy cooped in the loft apartment and accuses his wife of having an affair Later two ladies reluctantly agree to let a guy move into their apartment but theyre apprehensive about his intentions - for good reason

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Siamese twins one timid and kind-hearted and the other reckless and sadistic must make a decision on whether or not to allow an experimental surgery to have them separated even though one of them doesnt want to be split from the other

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick tries to stop drinking blood but falls off the wagon and must fight his urges to go on a murderous spree

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler discovers a way to increase his winnings but the method proves to be deadly

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E04
programme.desc: Kate insists that Luke take dancing lessons in order to improve his social graces but she is unpleasantly surprised to learn that his teacher is an attractive young woman

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When it seems that Grandpas location of water by divining rod is a failure Luke employs a geologist and drilling equipment as Amos gloats at the apparent unsuccessful outcome of Lukes chosen methods

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: The Amazing Alonzo performs illusions for his fans while neglecting gal pal Ramona Dr Diller and his wife dont know that their son Bobby lies to get attention Julies friend Karen has facial scars after an accident and is insecure

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment Daan and Liam try to convince Zoor that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path Maiya makes contact with Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Several crew members explore the planet Sunin including botanist Shermeen Williams who appears to have visionary gifts She links up with an alien called Vindrus who wants her help in transferring his body and that of his race into solid matter giving them proper human form so that they can join the universe as real matter However for every one of his race made flesh an Alphan must lose their matter

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: From the town of Sandhill Victoria along with an alcoholic and cynical hunter search the desert for an Indian brave infected with measles The Indian does not believe the White Mans medicine can save him-only the Medicine Man at the camp of his father the Chief The disease could wipe out the entire tribe

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Smitty encounter settlers headed to Wyoming who lost their guide On the way to Fort Laramie a group of rustlers steal their cattle and a boys brother is killed The two head to a nearby to try to recover the stolen cattle

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After being shot by robbers who were holding up a store a young police officer is treated by a doctor who was on the scene Unfortunately the officer later dies and the doctor becomes the only one who can identify the robbers But when Stone and Keller try to call him they find that he had to be using a phony name The man has been practicing using the name of several different doctors

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: As a posse of sheriff deputies pursue Dr Kimble on foot in the desert he is rescued by outlaw bikers who want to use him to settle a score with local law enforcement

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill re-programs Scooter making him into a suicide bomber aimed at UNECOMs headquarters

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
